title: A Lesson About Life and Improvement
article_text: My senior teacher gave a funny lesson about success and failure. The speaker shared his own background and a useful technique for improvement. He said a busy brain is a great tool for learning. Every circumstance can contribute to a lesson, even rain on your schedule. If you smoke, the consequence is a bad reaction from your body. The bottom line is that traffic is a common cause of stress. We must confirm our plans to avoid a mass of problems. The introduction to his talk was about the requirement for hard work. I will use his advice to make a real improvement in my life. This lesson will stay in my memory for a long time.

sentences.zh: 我的资深老师上了一堂关于成功与失败的有趣课程。

image_prompts: A senior teacher standing in front of a class, smiling and holding a pointer, with a blackboard showing the words 'success' and 'failure'.
A speaker at a podium with a microphone, with a background image of a city and a diagram showing a technique for improvement.
A cartoon brain with a busy expression, surrounded by books and a hammer tool, indicating learning.
A person standing in rain looking at a schedule on a wall, with arrows pointing to different circumstances.
A person smoking a cigarette, with a red warning sign showing a bad reaction from a body silhouette.
A bottom line drawn on a road with traffic jam, with stress symbols around.
A person using a pen to check a list with a confirm mark, avoiding a mass of tangled problem lines.
A speaker at a podium giving an introduction, with a sign showing 'requirement: hard work'.
A person looking in a mirror with an upward arrow labeled 'improvement' above their head.
A glowing light bulb labeled 'lesson' floating above a person's head, with a clock showing a long time.
